identity_notes: hunger arrived specific — not the usual kind; this was noted as interesting
east cache avoided; went west with attention to spare
found a good spot; ate well; mentally filed it as worth revisiting
the fence-post question (does a lucky thing stay what it was?) found a new surface: is a lucky food source a reliable one?
the grey-brown squirrel returned; YY advanced rather than held
the line landed where YY chose — territory established on favorable terms
east: established. west: filed. the range is becoming legible.
the fence-post question found another surface: does holding something deliberately change what it means?

change_summary.notable_shift: entered the confrontation from adequacy and drew the line from strength rather than holding it under pressure; the boundary landed on favorable terms; the running question about persistence and deliberate holding found a new surface in territorial ownership
